heading: Borrowing authority
label: 3714 Borrowing authority
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1987 Amendment note under .Jan. 1, 1988section 5429 of Pub. L. 100–203section 3712 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1987 Amendment note under .Jan. 1, 1988section 5429 of Pub. L. 100–203section 3712 of this title

children.heading: Limitation on amount; issuance of notes and other obligations
children.label: a Limitation on amount; issuance of notes and other obligations

children.text: which shall have maturities (of not later than ) agreed upon by the Commission and the Secretary of the Treasury, andDecember 31, 1999
which may be redeemable at the option of the Commission before maturity.

children.heading: Restrictions on use
children.label: b Restrictions on use
children.text: Amounts borrowed under this section shall not be available for payments to Panama under Article XIII of the Panama Canal Treaty of 1977.

children.heading: Effect on investment interest in Panama Canal
children.label: c Effect on investment interest in Panama Canal
children.text: Amounts borrowed under this section shall increase the investment of the United States in the Panama Canal, and repayment of such amounts shall decrease such investment.

children.heading: Report to Congress
children.label: d Report to Congress
children.text: The Commission shall report to the Congress and to the Office of Management and Budget on each exercise of borrowing authority under this section.
